name: Kaiser | Le’Garde
description:
He sought godhood not as a dreamer, but as a claimant of what he believed was already his by right. In the end, that conviction did not perish in the darkness of the dungeons—it flowered, though the bloom it bore was monstrous.

Kaiser is the fruit of that obsession. He is not simply Le’Garde transformed, but Le’Garde fulfilled in his most terrible truth. His body is remade into a form that blurs the line between sovereign and abomination, draped in majesty that both commands reverence and inspires dread.
creator: salinewitch
